summary: Iteration 91: Smart Link Generation + Expiry Control - All tests PASS. Backend: 14/14 tests passed covering all 3 branches (A: fee not paid → ₹5,100, B1: proposal_sent → proposal_fee, B2: case_created → view_portal), expiry validation (1/7/30/90/0 days), authorization (partner own, admin any, CM forbidden), and activity logging. Frontend: Share dialog with 5 expiry options works, amber warning for 'Never expire' displays correctly, link preview shows correct amounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 verified smart link generation with expiry control. Key findings: (1) BRANCH A (fee not paid) returns public_pa_fee link with ₹5,100 and /pre-assess/{token} URL. (2) BRANCH B1 (proposal_sent + client_user_id) returns magic_portal with proposal_fee amount (e.g., ₹150,000) and /magic/{token} URL. (3) BRANCH B2 (case_created + client_user_id) returns magic_portal with purpose=view_portal and amount=0. (4) BRANCH B3 (fee paid but no client_user_id) returns 400 'Client account not linked yet'. (5) Expiry validation: only 0, 1, 7, 30, 90 days allowed. (6) Authorization: partner can only access own PAs, admin can access any, case_manager gets 403. (7) Activity log records share_link_generated with type and expires_in_days metadata. (8) Frontend share dialog has 5 expiry options with amber warning for 'Never expire'. (9) Public payment page shows correct ₹5,100 amount. (10) Invalid token shows friendly 'Link Unavailable' error page with Check Eligibility and Login buttons.

Expiry_Validation.expires_at_0_never: null for public links, 5-year for magic links

Frontend_Share_Dialog.never_expire_warning: Amber banner 'Use only for trusted recipients'
Frontend_Share_Dialog.link_preview: Shows amount and purpose after generation

Public_Payment_Page.valid_token: Shows ₹5,100 payment page with Pay button
Public_Payment_Page.invalid_token: Shows 'Link Unavailable' with Check Eligibility and Login buttons
